user.title: Add a Lithe Audio speaker
user.description: Scan the network for speakers automatically, or enter a speaker's IP address manually.

data.mode: How would you like to find your speaker?

manual.title: Enter speaker details
manual.description: Enter the IP address of the speaker, then choose the model. The integration will use the correct connection method automatically.

certificate.title: Speaker certificate
certificate.description: This speaker model ({host}) uses an encrypted connection that requires a client certificate. Paste the contents of the Lithe-issued client.pem and client.key files below. Contact developer@litheaudio.com if you don't have them.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect — check the IP address, port, and (where required) that the client certificate is valid.
error.invalid_pem: client.pem doesn't look like a valid PEM certificate.
error.invalid_key: client.key doesn't look like a valid PEM private key.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — see the Home Assistant log for details.

abort.no_devices_found: No Lithe Audio speakers were found on the network.

play_chime.name: Play chime
play_chime.description: Trigger a built-in audio cue on the speaker (doorbell, alarm, notification, etc).

chime_index.name: Chime number
chime_index.description: Number of the built-in cue to play (1-15, depending on speaker model).

play_preset.name: Play preset
play_preset.description: Play a saved favourite by slot number.

save_preset.name: Save preset
save_preset.description: Save the currently playing item into a favourite slot.

play_direct.name: Play URL or file
play_direct.description: Play an audio URL, or a built-in file on the speaker.

path.name: URL or file path
path.description: An http(s) URL, or a built-in file path.

send_raw_command.name: Send advanced command
send_raw_command.description: Advanced - send a low-level command to the speaker. Most users will not need this.
